# Load file
path = '/mnt/data/file-LecC69qo4H3Sf3MWvyho8p-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text.startswith("الشيطان")

spans = {
    'Aya1': "وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِأَدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَى وَكُنتُ بِهِ عَدوًّا",
    'Aya2': "وَإِذْقُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِبَنِي آدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَى وَكُنتُ لَهُ عَدُوًّا",
    # note: maybe there's a space missing? Let's copy exact from print above.
}
# Let's copy exact text from print manually from the text variable to avoid missing diacritics.
# We programmatically extract between quotes, but could re-extract raw substrings.

# Let's extract all quoted texts after Quran cues. 
import re
# find all occurrences of pattern: " ... "
quoted = re.findall(r'"([^"]+)"', text)
quoted

results = []
for qt in quoted:
    start = text.find(qt)
    end = start + len(qt)
    assert text[start:end] == qt
    results.append((start, end, qt))
results
